mapper.select: SELECT rv.rev_id, rv.res_id, rv.com_id, rv.emp_id, rv.quantity, rv.status, rv.req_date, rv.remark, rv.updated_at, r.res_name, r.res_code, e.emp_name, d.dept_name FROM reservation rv JOIN resource r ON rv.res_id = r.res_id JOIN employee e ON rv.emp_id = e.emp_id JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE rv.com_id = #{comId} AND rv.rev_id = #{revId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (res_id, com_id, emp_id, quantity, status, req_date, remark, updated_at) VALUES (#{resId}, #{comId}, #{empId}, #{quantity}, 'WAI', NOW(), #{remark}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET res_id = #{resId}, quantity = #{quantity}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND rev_id = #{revId} AND status = 'WAI'
UPDATE reservation SET status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE rev_id = #{revId}
